itemName.zh: ORSIS T-5000M 7.62x51 栓动式狙击步枪 ☆

description.zh:
嘿！我从BTR驾驶员那里听说你找到了我的一个联系人，谢谢帮忙。不过我最近遇到了一个小问题，你看，我们的一个小组设法从Skyside拿到了那些Terragroup文件，里面的内容不是我们预期的...

这真是一团糟，显然一些黑帮分子也卷入了这件事，我还以为情况不会更糟了呢！至少我们不需要再在城市里搜索了，因为黑手党在Cape Dalniy有他们小小的“行动基地”，具体是在其中一个Chalet，听起来耳熟吧？我就是这么想的。Lightkeeper会在这里帮我们一点忙，你知道为什么这很重要，对吧？如果你想逃离塔科夫，这是唯一的方法，明白吗？

总之...我们需要你帮忙的是调查这些活动，我们只知道一些传言，所以这里没有什么百分之百安全。显然他们为了某些文件追捕了一些信使，重要的军事数据。不幸的是，不久之后一切都升级了，对他们来说不幸的是。我们在塔里的家伙告诉我们，他认识几个侦探，他们正在处理关于这些黑帮分子的案子，但没有人报告他们离开该地区，也没有人见过他们中的任何一个，奇怪...

嗯，他们的老板开一辆蓝色的merin车，想知道他从哪弄来的钱，嗯，很可能来自绝对合法的渠道，对吧？哈哈...不，显然不是。但这在这里并不重要，你需要找到这些文件，并找出这个黑帮老大的下落，你能做到吗？
description.en:
Hey! I heard from the BTR Driver that you found one of my contacts, thanks for helping with that. However I ran into a small problem recently, you see, one of our groups managed to obtain those Terragroup documents from Skyside, the contains were not what we expected...

This is such a mess, apparently some mobsters have been involved in this aswell, and I thought it couldn't get any worse! At least we don't need to search in the city anymore, because the mafia had their little "base of operations" at Cape Dalniy, specifically at one of the Chalets, rings a bell huh? That's what I thought. Lightkeeper is gonna help us a bit here, you know why that is important, right? If you want to escape from Tarkov, this is the only way, understand?

Anyway... The thing we need your help with is investigating these activities, we only know about rumors, so nothing is a hundred percent safe here. Apparently they chased down some messengers for certain documents, important military data. Unfortunately everything escalated shortly after, unfortunately for them. Our guy in the tower told us that he knew a few detectives who had a case going on about these mobsters, but nobody reported them leaving the area, and nobody has seen any of them either, strange...

Well, their boss drove a blue merin car, wonder where he got that money from hmm, probably from absolutely legal sources, right? Haha... No, obviously not. But that won't matter much here, you need to find these documents and find out what happened to this mob boss, can you do that?
